category.scope_note: Battery energy storage system comparison for China-to-Sri Lanka export compliance.

title.en: China-to-Sri Lanka BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入斯里兰卡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入斯里蘭卡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Sri Lanka SLSI standards, IEC 62619/62933 safety, UN 38.3 transport, PUCSL/CEB grid-connection and storage-integration requirements, fire-safety expectations, and 50 Hz grid parameters.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与斯里兰卡SLSI标准、IEC 62619/62933安全、UN 38.3运输、PUCSL/CEB并网及储能并网要求、消防安全要求和50 Hz电网参数差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與斯里蘭卡SLSI標準、IEC 62619/62933安全、UN 38.3運輸、PUCSL/CEB併網及儲能併網要求、消防安全要求和50 Hz電網參數差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLSI scope determination, PUCSL or CEB grid-connection or storage approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Sri Lanka SLSI, PUCSL, CEB, fire authority, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLSI适用范围裁定、PUCSL或CEB并网或储能批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行斯里兰卡SLSI、PUCSL、CEB、消防主管机关、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLSI適用範圍裁定、PUCSL或CEB併網或儲能批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯里蘭卡SLSI、PUCSL、CEB、消防主管機關、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Sri Lanka, IEC 62619 cell and module safety and IEC 62933 system-level compliance form the primary technical baseline expected by SLSI and project stakeholders. PUCSL and CEB impose grid-connection and storage-integration review requirements. UN 38.3 transport evidence is required where dangerous-goods transport rules apply. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 documentation supports technical due diligence but does not replace Sri Lanka SLSI, PUCSL, or CEB approval processes.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口斯里兰卡时，IEC 62619电芯与模组安全和IEC 62933系统级合规是SLSI及项目各方期望的主要技术基线。PUCSL和CEB对并网和储能并网提出审查要求。运输规则适用时需提供UN 38.3运输证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件可支持技术尽调，但不能替代斯里兰卡SLSI、PUCSL或CEB审批流程。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口斯里蘭卡時，IEC 62619電芯與模組安全和IEC 62933系統級合規是SLSI及項目各方期望的主要技術基線。PUCSL和CEB對併網和儲能併網提出審查要求。運輸規則適用時需提供UN 38.3運輸證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023文件可支持技術盡調，但不能替代斯里蘭卡SLSI、PUCSL或CEB審批流程。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
